body_text:
20:41 â October 27, 2020
CEBA 4.0 Application Update
We updated procedures on the CEBA application form based on the
CEBA 4.0 secure site announcement
. CEBA 4.0 applicants are business customers who previously did not qualify for a CEBA loan because they operated their business using a personal account. These customers are now potentially eligible for a CEBA loan if they open a business account.

Section 2.2, Financial Institutions Using ServiceNow Workflow
Added a field to the CEBA application for use by your financial institution to indicate if the application is for a CEBA 4.0 customer.
